case_title: MICHAEL WASHINGTON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES.
